welcome.title: Pastella Wallet
welcome.subtitle: Secure, fast, and easy-to-use wallet for Pastella

createOrImport.title: Choose Your Path
createOrImport.subtitle: Create a new wallet or import an existing one
createOrImport.createDesc: Generate a new wallet with a unique mnemonic phrase. Keep it safe!
createOrImport.importDesc: Restore your wallet using your mnemonic phrase or private key.
createOrImport.securityDesc: Your private keys are stored locally on your device and never shared. We cannot recover your wallet if you lose your mnemonic phrase.

createWallet.title: Your wallet has been created
createWallet.warning: This mnemonic phrase is the ONLY way to recover your wallet. Write it down and keep it safe. Never share it with anyone.

importWallet.title: Import Your Wallet
importWallet.subtitle: Restore your wallet using your mnemonic phrase or private key
importWallet.mnemonicHint: Separate words with spaces. Must be exactly 25 words.
importWallet.validMnemonic: Valid mnemonic! Wallet ready to import.
importWallet.privateKeyPlaceholder: Enter your private key (64 hex characters)
importWallet.privateKeyHint: Private key should be a 64-character hex string
importWallet.invalidPrivateKey: Invalid private key. Must be 64 hex characters.
importWallet.validPrivateKey: Valid private key! Wallet ready to import.
importWallet.warning: Make sure you have backed up your mnemonic phrase. You cannot recover your wallet without it.

confirmImport.title: Confirm Wallet Import
confirmImport.subtitle: Verify your wallet details and configure sync settings
confirmImport.scanHeightHint: The block height to start scanning from. Use 0 for a full sync, or a specific height to speed up the process.
confirmImport.warning: Make sure this is your correct wallet address. You cannot reverse the import process once completed.
confirmImport.invalidHeightMsg: Please enter a valid block height (0 or greater)
confirmImport.importFailedMsg: Failed to import wallet. Please try again.

setupPin.createSubtitle: Create a secure PIN to protect your wallet
setupPin.confirmSubtitle: Enter your PIN again to confirm
setupPin.createHint: Choose a PIN you can easily remember but others cannot guess.
setupPin.confirmHint: Make sure both PINs match exactly.
setupPin.saveError: Failed to save wallet. Please try again.

changePin.verifySubtitle: Enter your current PIN to continue
changePin.verifyInfo: For security, we need to verify your identity.
changePin.newInfo: Choose a PIN you can easily remember but others cannot guess.
changePin.confirmInfo: Make sure both PINs match exactly.

backupMnemonic.pinSubtitle: Enter your PIN to view your recovery phrase
backupMnemonic.title: Backup Your Mnemonic
backupMnemonic.subtitleDisplay: Write these words down on paper and store them safely
backupMnemonic.subtitleView: Your recovery phrase is displayed below. Make sure to store it safely.
backupMnemonic.warning: Never share your mnemonic phrase with anyone. Anyone with access to these words can control your wallet.
backupMnemonic.checklistScreenshots: • NOT stored in screenshots or photos

send.title: Send
send.subtitle: Send PAS to any address
send.invalidAddress: Invalid address (must start with "PAS" and be 54 characters)
send.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
send.scanInstructions: Align QR code within the frame to scan

receive.title: Receive
receive.subtitle: Share your address to receive PAS
receive.infoTitle: Only send PAS to this address
receive.infoText: Sending any other cryptocurrency to this address may result in permanent loss.

addressBook.title: Address Book
addressBook.subtitle: Manage your saved addresses
addressBook.noContactsSub: Add contacts to quickly send PAS to friends & family
addressBook.name: Name
addressBook.invalidAddress: Invalid address (must start with "PAS" and be 54 characters)
addressBook.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
addressBook.noName: Please enter a name for this contact
addressBook.scanInstructions: Align QR code within the frame to scan
addressBook.cameraPermission: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.offlineWarning: This node is currently offline. Please select an online node.

transactionDetails.title: Transaction Details
transactionDetails.explorerAlertMsg: Would you like to view this transaction on the block explorer?

staking.title: Staking
staking.subtitle: Earn rewards by staking your PAS
staking.earnRewards: Earn rewards by staking your PAS
staking.startStaking: Start staking your PAS to earn rewards!
staking.waitingForOutputs: Waiting for outputs to become available...
staking.outputsReady: Outputs ready! Tap to finalize your stake.
staking.durationInfo: Your coins will be locked for {{days}} days at {{rate}}% annual reward rate.
staking.whatIsStakingDesc: Staking allows you to earn rewards by locking your Pastella for a fixed period. Your staked tokens help secure the network and in return, you receive additional PAS as rewards.
staking.rewardsAccumulate: Rewards accumulate daily and can be claimed after the lock period ends.
staking.lockPeriodsDesc: Choose from different lock durations with varying APY rates:
staking.noEarlyUnstake: You cannot unstake early. Funds are locked for the chosen duration
staking.rewardsCompound: Rewards compound automatically for maximum returns
staking.stakingFee: A small fee is required to create a stake
staking.stakingInfoText: Staking locks your coins for a set period to earn rewards. Longer durations earn higher rewards.
staking.stakingTxSent: Staking transaction sent! Waiting for confirmation...

settings.title: Settings
settings.resyncMessage: This will clear your current wallet state and resync from block {height}.
settings.resyncMessageGenesis: This will clear your current wallet state and resync from block 0. This may take a while.
settings.deleteWalletMessage: This will permanently delete your wallet from this device. Make sure you have backed up your mnemonic phrase!
